$meta.name: Apollo
$meta.description: YouSchool design system — canonical token source of truth
$meta.status: draft — reconciled against Assets-site library; all documented decisions resolved (see $meta.resolved_decisions)
sources: Figma: Assets site (live-site asset library — 224 component sets, 150 Figma Variables; added v0.2.0)
reconciliation_notes: color.text.primary / color.text.heading: live site values (#393E59 / #262B47) adopted as canonical over Figma UI Kit values (#35394A / #202333) — site is shipped ground truth.

radius.button (10px) vs radius.badge (7px): previously conflated as one '20px' value during initial audit — now split into distinct tokens since site and Figma genuinely differ by component, not by error.
color.primary.text-a11y (#0075DB) added — #0088FF fails AA contrast (3.52:1) as body-size text/links. #0088FF remains valid for backgrounds, large text, icons, fills.
color.neutral.400 (#7E84A3) restricted to non-text use (icons, decorative, disabled, large text only) — fails AA as body text (3.67:1 on white).
shadow.* scale adopted as single canonical soft/ambient elevation system, replacing inconsistent rgba(126,132,163,*) (Plateforme/Bogy) and rgba(81,69,205,*) (Plateforme gradient) shadows.
radius.button (10px) and radius.card (20px) confirmed byte-identical across all 12 sampled site templates — safe as final.

v0.2.0: accent decision RESOLVED against the Assets-site Variable collection — teal/magenta are a per-sector theme system (color.sector_themes), not drift. Real brand teal is #0095AD (sector.ma.primary); the earlier #5EEAD4 sample was incorrect and is removed.
v0.2.0: color.primary ramp corrected to Figma Variables — 600=#1C64F2, hover=700 #0458D6, active=900 #233876. The v0.1 #007AE6 hover was an interpolation and is superseded.

v0.2.0: adopted the Figma color/theme/interactive/* semantic token layer (color.interactive) — primary/secondary/neutral/danger/ghost x default/hover/active/disabled. Fills the old components.known_gaps for state definitions.

v0.2.0: radius.button is size-scaled in Figma (sm 4 / md 6 / lg 8 / xl 10px), not a single value; radius.badge is component-level, not a variable. The '7px spacing base' is a likely capture artifact — Figma spacing variables are a clean even scale (6/8/10/12/14/16/18/20px).

resolved_decisions.description: Magenta #ED1E79 appears 547x across the Assets-site file but was not in the Variable collection like the other sector themes. RESOLUTION: it is the Métiers de bouche / Restauration sector accent — added to color.sector_themes as 'bouche' (primary #ED1E79, secondary #FFE9F3), the values already used verbatim for that sector's cards, pills and pictograms. JUSTIFICATION: the high count reflects a high-traffic food/restauration funnel plus incidental reuse (required-field asterisks, decorative funnel polygons), not system-wide brand intent — so it is NOT promoted to a general accent/magenta token. Non-sector uses (required marks) should reference the semantic color.danger token instead; decorative funnel art may keep the sector-derived hue.

Orange pulsing CTA glow (Financement/Alternance/Programme/Stages), injected by an A/B tool, off-brand, auto-animating indefinitely. RESOLUTION: retint to brand blue and replace the perpetual pulse with shadow.md at rest plus a hover halo — no autonomous motion. JUSTIFICATION: WCAG 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide) requires any auto-animating content that runs more than 5s to be pausable/stoppable/hideable; an indefinite glow exposes no control and fails. A hover-triggered halo is user-initiated and therefore exempt, and retinting drops the off-palette orange. Under prefers-reduced-motion the halo is suppressed. Conversion impact should still be A/B-validated by the CTA-performance owner, but the accessibility blocker is removed.

primary.note: v0.2.0: ramp reconciled to Figma color/core/primary/*. 500 is the brand blue (fills/large text/icons). 600 #1C64F2 backgrounds, 700 #0458D6 hover, 900 #233876 active.

secondary.note: From Plateforme UI Kit (primary-2). Used in gradients. Not yet confirmed for use outside Plateforme — review during component pass.

gradient.$source: Plateforme (app) — promoted to canon v0.9.0. App-only; the marketing site stays flat.
gradient.note: Use 'brand' wherever there is white text — both stops clear 4.5:1 on white, so white text is AA at any size (Reprendre circle, active stepper step, Assistance button, help bubble). 'brand-vivid' (light end #2D7BFF ~3.6:1) is limited to large/bold text or text-free fills.

slate.note: v0.14: the single canonical neutral ramp (renamed from 'neutral'; duplicate family removed v0.14.1). Cool blue-grey signature. WCAG on white: 600+ AAA body, 400 AA large/UI/icons only, 50–200 non-text surfaces & borders.

accent_unconfirmed.note: RESOLVED in v0.2.0 — see color.sector_themes. The teal/magenta accents were a per-sector theme system, not drift. This key is retained only as a tombstone; do not use.

sector_themes.$source: Figma Variables — 'Variable collection'. Each vocational sector carries a Primary (+ Secondary tint) used on sector cards, mega-menu and pictograms.

bouche.label: Métiers de bouche
bouche.note: Added v0.16.0 (resolved magenta-scope). Restauration/food sector accent; the #ED1E79 that appears 547x site-wide. Not a brand-wide accent — required-field marks use color.danger, not this.

petite_enfance.label: Petite Enfance
petite_enfance.note: Added v0.19.0 from the live site (Figma source). Santé & social domain, blue.

nutrition.label: Nutrition
nutrition.note: Added v0.19.0 from the live site (Figma source).

btp.label: Bâtiment (BTP)
btp.note: Added v0.19.0 from the live site (Figma source).

competences_pro.label: Compétences Pro
competences_pro.note: Added v0.19.0 from the live site (Figma source). Neutral slate accent.

bureautique.label: Bureautique
bureautique.note: Added v0.19.0 from the live site (Figma source).

interactive.$source: Figma Variables — color/theme/interactive/*. Semantic component-state layer.

usage_rules.primary.500: Backgrounds, large headings (>=19px bold or >=24px regular), icons, button fills, UI component borders/focus rings. Never as small body/link text on white or neutral-50/100/200 — fails AA.
usage_rules.primary.text-a11y: Use for inline links and any brand-blue text at body size (<19px). Passes AA on white (4.60:1).
usage_rules.slate.400: Icons, decorative elements, disabled-state text, large text only (>=19px bold / >=24px regular). Fails AA as normal body text.
usage_rules.slate.600_and_darker: Safe for all body text and labels on white/slate-50/slate-100 backgrounds.
usage_rules.slate.100: Background fill only — avoid placing primary.500 or slate.400 text directly on it (both fail 3:1+ here).

typography.note: Marketing site headings currently ship larger/bolder (H1 45px/700) than this scale. Decision needed during typography review: two documented contexts (marketing vs product) within one system, or full convergence on one scale.

radius.note: v0.2.0: button radius is size-scaled per Figma borderradius/theme/button/*. Input md = 6px.

spacing.note: v0.2.0: Figma spacing/theme/* variables are a clean even scale. The v0.1 '7px base, [7,14,16,21,30,37]' was a capture artifact and is superseded.

shadow.$direction: soft/ambient — slate-900-tinted (#0F172A), low opacity, large blur

cta-pulse.status: RESOLVED v0.15.0 — perpetual pulse dropped (WCAG 2.2.2); retinted to brand blue as a static rest shadow + user-initiated hover halo. Suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.
cta-pulse.adopted_value: rest: shadow.md; hover: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0,136,255,.25) (no autonomous animation)

components.status: v0.2.0: state system defined via color.interactive (from Figma). Component geometry (button/input radius + padding) defined via radius.* and spacing.*. Documented live in 'Apollo Design System.dc.html'.
known_gaps: Modal, Dropdown sizing not yet tokenized (built from radius.card + shadow.* in the reference doc)
Nav / mega-menu remains a composition pattern, not an atomic token set
